activities_projects.title: Collecting Daily Temperature Data
activities_projects.objective: Understand how to collect data and record it
steps: Record daily temperature for 7 days
Write the data in a table
Identify the highest and lowest temperatures

activities_projects.title: Frequency Table Creation
activities_projects.objective: Organize data into a frequency table
steps: Take marks of 10 students in a test
List marks in ascending order
Count frequency of each mark and tabulate

activities_projects.title: Draw a Bar Graph
activities_projects.objective: Represent data visually using a bar graph
steps: Take data from frequency table
Draw axes and mark scales
Draw bars corresponding to frequency

activities_projects.title: Draw a Histogram
activities_projects.objective: Represent grouped data using a histogram
steps: Take grouped data (marks in intervals)
Draw axes with intervals and frequency
Draw bars touching each other for histogram

activities_projects.title: Calculate Mean of Data
activities_projects.objective: Compute average of a data set
steps: Take marks of 10 students
Add all marks
Divide by number of students to find mean
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands mean as measure of central tendency

activities_projects.title: Find Median of Data
activities_projects.objective: Identify median of a given data set
steps: Arrange data in ascending order
Identify middle value (or average of middle two)
Record median

activities_projects.title: Identify Mode of Data
activities_projects.objective: Find mode from a given data set
steps: List data values
Count frequency of each value
Identify value with highest frequency as mode

activities_projects.title: Draw a Pie Chart
activities_projects.objective: Represent data in a circular chart
steps: Take data of students’ favourite subjects
Convert frequencies into angles
Draw circle and sectors using protractor

activities_projects.title: Data Observation Activity
steps: Take collected data of marks or height
Identify highest, lowest and most frequent values
Write observations in sentences

activities_projects.title: Compare Two Data Sets
activities_projects.objective: Compare data using tabulation and simple graphs
steps: Take marks of students from two classes
Tabulate both data sets
Draw simple bar graph to compare
Write conclusion about which class performed better
